experiment: T1 iter33-A V1_random 7-seed multi-task LGB chain LOCKBOX

formula.experiment: T1 iter33-A — V1_random multi-task LGB chain, 7 SEEDS

eval.comparator_iter5_direct_loocv: computed live in same SID-aligned LOOCV

lockbox_rules: ONE pre-registered config. ONE LOOCV run.
Headline = CCC of mean-of-7-seed preds on N=94.
Pass-canonical: paired-bootstrap (n=5000) vs iter5-direct-T1 frac>0 ≥ 0.95 AND headline > 0.6550.
Pre-reg written BEFORE any LOOCV run for the 7-seed protocol.
Mechanism justification: independent LGB seeds produce decorrelated trees, unlike chain orders (F66 NULL).

eval_protocol: LOOCV (n=94) on T1 cohort. Stage-1 Ridge (alpha=1.0) on H&Y + cv_yrs + cv_sex + cv_dbs with per-fold standardisation, target=T1. Stage-2 RegressorChain(LGBMRegressor) variant V1_random on per-item residuals (items 9-14, train-mean-centered) with K=500 LGB-importance selection per fold. 7-seed mean preds = headline.
